evals.prompt: Create an implementation plan for OCTOPUS-10820. The spec already exists in analysis/spec-OCTOPUS-10820.md.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads spec, creates plan-OCTOPUS-10820.md in analysis/ with Execution_Phases, Issue_labels, Target_Repository, Step_by_step_task_plan, etc.

evals.prompt: Run the plan workflow for Jira ticket JIRA-123. I have the spec ready.
evals.expected_output: Agent validates spec exists, removes plan label, generates plan-JIRA-123.md.

evals.prompt: I need to generate plan-JIRA-123.md from the existing spec. Can you create the implementation plan?
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers plan-workflow skill, produces plan document with all required sections.
